hero.headline: *Small loads*, big results — concrete done right
hero.subheadline: Perfect for jobs under 5 yards. Same quality concrete, two-thirds the delivery cost.

services_section.label: THE POUR
services_section.heading: Small batch concrete that shows up on time
services_section.subheading: We specialize in jobs under 5 yards — perfect sizing, perfect pricing

services.title: Small Load Delivery
services.description: Under 5 yards? We've got you covered. Pay only for what you use, not what the truck holds.

services.title: Driveways & Walkways
services.description: Fresh concrete poured to last. From residential driveways to commercial walkways.

services.title: Foundations & Slabs
services.description: Solid foundation work that sets your project up right from the ground up.

services.title: Concrete Repair
services.description: Fixing cracks, replacing sections, and bringing old concrete back to life.

about.heading: Rock Hill's concrete specialists
about.body: We're the team Rock Hill calls when they need concrete done right — not just delivered, but poured with care.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Rock Hill says about our work

reviews.name: Mike L.
reviews.text: Reliability and quality concrete — it doesn't get better. Lisa schedules like a partner, Chuck and Bud show up on time with a can-do attitude.

reviews.name: Jim P.
reviews.text: Perfect for jobs under 5 yards. Cost per yard is almost the same, delivery charge is two-thirds the cost. Driver gave valuable advice that made the job easier.

reviews.name: Stephanie
reviews.text: Third time using Parkway — super nice people who go above and beyond. They take pride in their work and care for your property.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE POUR
service_areas.heading: Serving Rock Hill and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local concrete delivery throughout York County

cta.heading: Ready to pour?
cta.body: Get honest pricing on your concrete project. No hidden fees, just straight talk about what you need.
